records.content: A space for mathematical notes and small expositions on various algebraic topics.

I am a master’s student in mathematics, mostly interested in algebraic stuff.In this blog I share things that I find interesting while I study.

I write as a student who is still learning, and these posts are a way to collect what I study and to share it with others.
Posts on more advanced topics that I encounter along the way (ideas that I like, want to remember, or want to understand better).

hierarchy.lvl3: Route to the Fermat’s Christmas Theorem
Route to the Fermat’s Christmas Theorem

records.content: A long-form series of short weekly notes developing most of the theory needed to give a complete proof of the Fermat’s Christmas Theorem, starting from the very basics. I will try to write the posts in a very simple language, so that anyone could easily follow along.
Everything here is written in my free time, so there may be occasional errors.If you notice something unclear, feel free to open an issue on GitHub.
